title: orthiopteris henriettae
intro: Orthiopteris henriettae, also known as the New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orthiopteris henriettae include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues.
